title: Zandhoogte Estate: a slice of paradise awaits you
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of the...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Nestled in the heart of the charming coastal village of Tergniet, Mossel Bay, the newly developed Zandhoogte Estate combines modern luxury with practical living, promising a slice of paradise for its new homeowners.


> With the property set between the Indian Ocean and the Outeniqua Mountains, Zandhoogte Estate offers its residents stunning views from the comfort of a beautiful and secure environment.


Zandhoogte Estate, a development of WMPG Property Group, features access control gates, security patrols, and electric fencing to ensure its residents' safety and peace of mind.

The estate is the ideal home for those seeking a modern living space with enhanced security and top-notch amenities. The surrounding neighbourhood of Tergniet also serves as an added perk for those living in the estate. Its breathtaking ocean views, sandy beaches, relaxed lifestyle, and proximity to essential amenities, make it the perfect location for families and retirees alike.

The first phase of Zandhoogte Estate will introduce 24 duplex and 22 simplex units designed for comfort and convenience.Each duplex unit includes a top floor with three spacious bedrooms and two modern bathrooms. The ground floors of these units include two garages equipped with automated motors, a stylish kitchen with a private scullery, an open-plan lounge and dining area, and an indoor braai area, to enhance the living experience of the homeowners regardless of weather conditions.

These units are finished with high-quality materials and feature a Smeg oven, ensuring a luxurious and practical cooking experience.

Additionally, each unit comes with a 2500-litre backup water tank and a 5 kVA inverter, providing residents with reliability and sustainability.

An attractive financial incentive for potential buyers is the absence of transfer duties, making the purchase process more affordable.

Those who purchase in phase one of the development also stand the chance of winning a three-day MSC boat cruise for two people.


> Phase one of Zandhoogte Estate will be launched this weekend on Saturday, 29 June from 10:00 to 17:00 and Sunday, 30 June from 12:00 to 17:00 WMPG Property Group invites come and visit the site and find out more on potentially becoming homeowners in this stunning estate.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
